## What & why
Briefly, what this changes and the reason.

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build` pass
- [ ] New behavior has a test
- [ ] `git grep -iE "saucedemo|orangehrm|the-internet" packages/windup/src/` is empty
- [ ] Docs updated (package README + `docs/specs/SPEC.md`) if behavior/flags changed
- [ ] If a prompt template changed: revalidated live (say how)
